pageTitle: Pa orchymyn ydych chi eisiau i’r llys ei wneud, a pham?
caption: Gwneud cais
heading: Pa orchymyn ydych chi eisiau i’r llys ei wneud, a pham?
includeApplicationDetails: Rhowch fanylion unrhyw ffeithiau neu dystiolaeth yr ydych yn meddwl y dylai'r llys ystyried pan mae'n gwneud penderfyniad.   Gallwch uwchlwytho eich tystiolaeth ar y dudalen nesaf.
whatOrderDoYouWantLabel: Eglurwch beth ydych eisiau i’r llys ei wneud, a pham

list.heading: Er enghraifft, dywedwch wrth y llys:
SOMETHING_ELSE: cywhy you want to add someone to your claim
cywhy you should not be sanctioned (punished)
cywhy you want to transfer to the High Court for enforcement
ADJOURN: cyyou are unable to attend the hearing due a pre-existing medical appointment

errors.whatOrderDoYouWant: Cadarnhau pa orchymyn ydych eisiau i’r llys ei wneud, a pham
